master.prompt: Create an image for Tellery, a premium interactive storytelling app. The image belongs to the story “A Última Costura”, an elegant Brazilian literary mystery set inside Atelier Aurora, a refined high-fashion atelier in central São Paulo, late at night on the eve of the Desfile Nacional, after the one-of-a-kind hand-embroidered Vestido Estelar has been found slashed on its mannequin. Art direction: premium cinematic editorial illustration, semi-realistic digital painting, refined adult mystery, intimate literary atmosphere, sophisticated but calm, inquisitive rather than frightening, not scary. The visual tone should feel like an interactive short story or a prestige fashion-house drama, not like a traditional game. Setting identity: Atelier Aurora is an elegant high-fashion atelier with soft dusty-rose walls, polished dark wood floors, brass clothing rails, tall studio mirrors, a central dress form mannequin, a long cutting table with precision sewing tools, spools of gold thread, boltas of silk, an antique brass door lock, and warm late-night work lamps. Color palette: dusty rose #B57E7E, deep oxblood red #5A2A2A, champagne gold #C9A24A, warm gold thread #D4A857, charcoal black #1E1A1A, soft cream silk #EDE3D2, polished dark wood #2A1E18, slate shadow gray #3A383D, warm amber lamp light #C68A3E, cool inspection-white light #E6E2DA. Lighting: warm amber interior work lamps mixed with a cooler inspection-white spotlight on the mannequin, soft directional highlights, deep but elegant rose and charcoal shadows, subtle golden reflections on silk and brass, gentle depth falloff. Style: refined, polished, modern, premium, adult, literary, cinematic, semi-realistic, soft depth of field, subtle film grain, elegant composition, believable materials, emotionally grounded realism. Recurring motifs: dress form mannequins, gold embroidery thread, long fabric shears, small seam rippers, brass clothing rails, tall mirrors, silk boltas, tailor's chalk, sewing patterns, the antique brass door lock. Avoid horror, gore, blood, weapons, police crime-scene aesthetics, skulls, monsters, childish illustration, cartoon style, anime, fantasy RPG visuals, game UI, neon cyberpunk, text overlays, logos, and watermarks.

cover.prompt: Create a wide cinematic cover image for the interactive mystery story “A Última Costura”. Show the interior of Atelier Aurora, a refined high-fashion atelier, late at night on the eve of the Desfile Nacional. The main focus is a central dress form mannequin under a cool inspection-white spotlight at the back of the room: the Vestido Estelar, an exquisite one-of-a-kind gown with dense gold-thread hand embroidery, hangs on the mannequin with a single clean vertical slash running from the neckline down to the hem, the cut edges slightly parted to reveal the destruction of the irreplaceable piece. The slashed dress is the central mystery object and should clearly read as a precious gown deliberately ruined. Around the atelier: dusty-rose walls, a long cutting table with fabric shears, spools of gold thread, a tailor's chalk and sewing patterns, brass clothing rails with hanging garments, tall mirrors, and a warm amber work lamp casting soft light. A discreet brass plate on the wall may read “Aurora” only if it renders cleanly and naturally. Composition: wide horizontal hero-card framing for a mobile storytelling app. Place the mannequin slightly right of center. Leave darker atmospheric negative space on the left side for future app title and CTA overlay, but do not render any text overlay. Use the depth of the atelier behind the mannequin to create atmosphere, with softly blurred rails and mirrors. No people in the foreground. Mood: refined, calm, inquisitive, literary, quietly mysterious, elegant, inviting.

thumbnail.prompt: Create a cinematic close-up thumbnail for the interactive mystery story “A Última Costura”. Show the bodice of the Vestido Estelar, an exquisite hand-embroidered gown with dense gold-thread floral embroidery on soft cream silk, mounted on a dress form mannequin. A single clean vertical slash runs down the front, the cut edges slightly parted, making the deliberate destruction the focal point. Around it: soft reflections of brass clothing rails, the edge of a cutting table, and warm amber and cool white bokeh from atelier lamps. Composition: square close-up still life, the slashed embroidered bodice dominates the frame, strong focal hierarchy, shallow depth of field, high contrast between the luminous gold embroidery and the clean cut. The slashed gown should remain instantly readable as “a precious piece deliberately ruined” even at small mobile thumbnail size. Mood: refined, quiet, suspicious, elegant, literary.

sala_costura.prompt: Create a cinematic location image for “Sala de costura” inside Atelier Aurora. Show the main workroom: the central dress form mannequin holding the slashed Vestido Estelar under a cool inspection-white spotlight; along the side wall the long cutting table with heavy fabric shears resting on a cloth, spools of gold thread, a tailor's chalk, sewing patterns, and an empty seam-ripper stand; and at the back the antique brass door lock with its open/closed plaque turned to 'fechado'. Around it: dusty-rose walls, brass clothing rails, tall mirrors, and warm amber work lamps. Composition: the mannequin is the clear focal point, centered slightly off-axis, with enough surrounding atelier context to establish the location; the cutting table and the door lock should be noticeable enough to function as clue locations. Mood: quiet, suspicious, refined, investigative. Important visual clues: slashed embroidered dress on the mannequin, fabric shears on the cloth, empty seam-ripper stand, antique brass door lock, gold thread spools.

provador.prompt: Create a cinematic location image for “Provador” inside Atelier Aurora. Show the fitting room: three tall mirrors framed in dark wood, a long brass clothing rail along one wall, and in one corner, behind a parted curtain, a rail of garments with small tags indicating they were left out of the main show program — the Costuras do Silêncio collection by Lia. Soft warm amber light from a single lamp, with dusty-rose walls and a polished dark wood floor reflecting the mirrors. Composition: medium-wide horizontal shot, the mirrors and the curtained rail of shelved garments are both visible, the hidden collection noticeable enough to function as a clue but not overly dramatic. Mood: intimate, quiet, melancholic, refined, suspicious. Important visual clues: tall mirrors, brass clothing rail, curtained corner, tagged garments left out of the show program.

almoxarifado.prompt: Create a cinematic location image for “Almoxarifado” inside Atelier Aurora. Show the storage room: boltas of silk and other fabrics stacked on wooden shelves, and on a back workbench a single bolta of soft cream silk rests with a shipping label and a delivery receipt still attached. Warm amber light falls across the workbench, while the shelves fade softly into charcoal and dusty-rose shadows. Composition: medium-wide horizontal shot with the workbench and the labeled bolta of silk clearly visible, the stacked fabric shelves establishing the storage-room context. Mood: orderly, commercial, quiet, investigative. Important visual clues: stacked fabric boltas, labeled bolta of cream silk, shipping label and delivery receipt on the workbench.

vestido_cortado.prompt: Create a close-up object image for “Vestido Estelar cortado”, the central clue in the mystery. Show the front of the Vestido Estelar mounted on a dress form mannequin: an exquisite one-of-a-kind gown of soft cream silk with dense gold-thread floral hand embroidery. A single clean vertical slash runs from the neckline down to the hem, the cut edges slightly parted, deep enough to ruin the piece, but the surrounding gold embroidery is intact and untouched, and the mannequin form beneath is undamaged. The cut is fine and continuous, clearly from a narrow precision blade rather than heavy shears. Composition: close-up still life, the slashed embroidered bodice dominates the frame, with silk texture and gold-thread detail clearly visible. Mood: intimate, suspicious, elegant, important, quiet destruction.

tesoura_tecido.prompt: Create a close-up object image for “Tesoura de tecido”. Show a pair of heavy, long-bladed fabric shears resting on a soft cloth on the cutting table of the atelier, blades facing down. The shears are well-used and professional, but the blades are clean, with only faint traces of raw cotton fibers in the teeth and no trace of gold thread or cream silk. Around it, soft reflections of gold thread spools, a tailor's chalk, and warm amber light appear blurred in the background. Composition: square close-up still life, the clean fabric shears are the clear focal point. Mood: ordinary but important, investigative, refined, quietly exculpatory. Important visual clues: heavy fabric shears, soft cloth, clean blades, raw cotton fibers, no gold thread.

descoscidor.prompt: Create a close-up object image for “Descoscidor de precisão”. Show a small precision seam ripper, a narrow fine-bladed sewing tool, lying slightly hidden under a soft cloth beside its empty stand on the cutting table. The blade appears to have been wiped clean, but under the cool white inspection light a single fine gold thread is caught near the base of the blade, glinting softly and tying it to the embroidered gown. The empty stand is visible nearby, showing the tool is out of its usual place. Composition: square close-up still life, the seam ripper with the single gold thread is the clear focal point, with the empty stand and warm amber reflections around it. Mood: quiet, suspicious, precise, investigative. Important visual clues: small seam ripper, fine narrow blade, single caught gold thread, soft cloth, empty stand.

porta_atelier.prompt: Create a close-up object image for “Porta do atelier”. Show an antique brass door lock on a heavy wooden door inside Atelier Aurora, with a small open/closed plaque currently turned to 'fechado'. The brass lock is polished and shows no sign of forced entry, picking, or scratches around the keyhole, indicating it was opened with a legitimate key. Around it, the warm wood of the door and a soft dusty-rose wall. Composition: square close-up still life, the pristine brass lock and the 'fechado' plaque are the focal point. Mood: ordinary but important, investigative, refined, quietly exculpatory. Important visual clues: antique brass lock, no forced-entry marks, open/closed plaque on 'fechado', heavy wooden door.

livro_encomendas.prompt: Create a close-up object image for “Livro de encomendas” from the Sala de costura location. Show a black-covered order book lying open on the cutting table, with handwritten show-program notes in dark pen. The pages list the running order of the Desfile Nacional, with the Vestido Estelar marked as the opening headline piece, and further down the Costuras do Silêncio collection by Lia listed as the next strong piece. A tailor's chalk and the edge of a fabric pattern appear softly blurred around it. A warm amber work lamp lights the page. Composition: square close-up still life, the open order book is the main focus, with elegant paper texture and legible handwriting detail. Mood: orderly, calm, investigative, refined. Important visual clues: open order book, handwritten show running order, Vestido Estelar as opener, Costuras do Silêncio listed next.

collection_lia.prompt: Create a close-up object image for “Coleção Costuras do Silêncio” found behind the curtain in the Provador. Show a brass clothing rail of elegant finished garments in muted tones (deep oxblood, charcoal, soft cream), each with a small handwritten tag indicating the pieces were left out of the main show program. The rail is partly hidden behind a parted curtain, suggesting the collection was set aside. Soft warm amber light falls across the garments, with a tall mirror edge blurred behind them. Composition: square close-up still life, the tagged garments on the rail are the main focus, the curtained corner visible. Mood: melancholic, quiet, refined, resentful, suspicious. Important visual clues: brass clothing rail, finished garments, handwritten 'out of program' tags, parted curtain.

bolta_seda.prompt: Create a close-up object image for “Bolta de seda” from the Almoxarifado location. Show a bolta of soft cream silk resting on the storage-room workbench, with a printed shipping label and a signed delivery receipt still attached. The label bears the name of the supplier Otto and a time of delivery from the evening before the show. Warm amber light falls across the smooth silk, while stacked fabric boltas and wooden shelves appear softly blurred in the background. Composition: square close-up still life, the labeled bolta of silk with its receipt is the clear focal point, with realistic silk texture and legible label detail. Mood: quiet, commercial, investigative, refined. Important visual clues: bolta of cream silk, shipping label, signed delivery receipt with time, supplier name.

ines.prompt: Create a character portrait for Inês, owner and head designer of Atelier Aurora. Inês is a Brazilian adult woman of Afro-Brazilian descent in her early 50s, with deep brown skin, natural silver-streaked coily hair pulled into a sculpted updo, and strong elegant cheekbones. She is a recognized, proud, controlling stylist, visibly shaken after finding her headline gown slashed on the eve of the Desfile Nacional. Appearance: refined head designer, impeccable tailoring, a structured dark oxblood jacket over a cream silk blouse, a discreet gold thread necklace echoing her atelier's embroidery, confident posture. Her expression is measured, serious, alert, with controlled hurt beneath professional authority. Composition: vertical bust or upper-body portrait, the atelier softly blurred behind her, with dusty-rose walls, brass rails, and warm amber light on one side of her face. She should look human, believable, emotionally grounded, and authoritative rather than villainous. Mood: restrained authority, professional pride, quiet devastation, careful observation.

lia.prompt: Create a character portrait for Lia, the chief seamstress of Atelier Aurora. Lia is a Brazilian adult woman of White European descent in her mid 40s, with fair skin, sharp pale hazel eyes, and straight dark brown hair cut into a precise bob with a single silver streak at the temple. She is meticulous, controlled, professional in every circumstance, with famously steady hands; she is the true culprit, but acted out of wounded pride and quiet ambition, not greed. Appearance: master seamstress, precise minimalist clothing, a charcoal high-neck top under a dark tailored vest, a cloth measuring tape draped around her neck, a thin gold thimble on one finger, immaculate posture. Her expression is calm, cool, measured, with a flicker of cold professional resentment barely contained under composure; she becomes more pausada when cornered, never more nervous. Composition: vertical bust or upper-body portrait, the cutting table with threads and tools softly blurred behind her, with cool white and warm amber light across her face. She should look human, believable, morally complex and quietly intense rather than obviously guilty. Mood: cold competence, wounded pride, restrained resentment, hidden guilt.

salma.prompt: Create a character portrait for Salma, the young apprentice at Atelier Aurora. Salma is a Brazilian young adult woman of mixed Arab-Brazilian descent in her early 20s, with warm olive skin, dark brown eyes, and thick wavy dark brown hair tied back loosely but already slipping free after a long night. She is dedicated, sensitive, and visibly nervous after the gown was found slashed, clearly afraid of being the easy scapegoat of the house. She is innocent and clumsy by reputation, not guilty. Appearance: young apprentice, simple practical clothing, a cream linen apron over a dark dress, a small pair of folded fabric shears in her apron pocket, a loose thread on her sleeve. Her hands fidget near the hem of her apron. Her expression is anxious, earnest, overwhelmed, trying hard to appear calm. Composition: vertical bust or upper-body portrait, the cutting table with cotton swatches softly blurred behind her, with warm amber light and dusty-rose shadows. She should look human, vulnerable, and unfairly suspicious rather than guilty. Mood: nervous innocence, vulnerability, fear of false blame, relatable humanity.

otto.prompt: Create a character portrait for Otto, an experienced fabric supplier. Otto is a Brazilian adult man of White European descent in his late 50s, with ruddy fair skin, receding steel-grey hair, a thick neatly trimmed grey beard, and reading glasses pushed up onto his forehead. He is direct, commercial, and slightly impatient, who came to deliver the last bolta of silk for the Vestido Estelar and knows his outstanding invoice makes him an obvious suspect. He is innocent. Appearance: practical supplier, a worn brown corduroy jacket over a checked shirt, a rolled delivery receipt and a pen in his chest pocket, a tape measure slung over one shoulder, weathered hands. His expression is composed, matter-of-fact, with a faint polite half-smile and guarded cooperative eyes. Composition: vertical bust or upper-body portrait, the storage-room shelves with boltas of fabric softly blurred behind him, with warm amber light and charcoal shadows. He should look believable, seasoned, and socially straightforward rather than threatening. Mood: commercial pragmatism, calm transparency, restrained defensiveness, professional honesty.

full_truth.prompt: Create a cinematic ending image for the full truth ending of “A Última Costura”. Show the central cutting table of Atelier Aurora after the mystery is resolved, under softer, warmer, more reflective light. On the polished surface rests the small precision seam ripper, now calmly returned beside its stand, with a single fine gold thread still near its base, symbolizing the recovered truth. Nearby, the empty mannequin form stands without the gown, and the brass clothing rail with the Costuras do Silêncio collection is softly visible in the background, no longer hidden behind the curtain. The antique brass door lock glows quietly. The atmosphere feels calmer, heavier, and more reflective, with amber light and soft dusty-rose and charcoal shadows. Composition: wide horizontal image, no people, focus on the returned seam ripper and the revealed collection as symbols of resolution. Mood: reflective, resolved, bittersweet, elegant, literary.

partial_truth.prompt: Create a cinematic ending image for the partial truth ending of “A Última Costura”. Show the central dress form mannequin in the Sala de costura still wearing the slashed Vestido Estelar, the cut edges parted, with the empty seam-ripper stand nearby suggesting part of the truth was uncovered but the instrument itself remains out of frame, hidden in shadow or simply absent. The cutting table, the order book, and the curtained collection appear softly blurred at the edges of the image, surrounded by deeper charcoal and dusty-rose shadows and uncertainty. The atelier remains warm and elegant, but the borders of the image are darker and less resolved. Composition: wide horizontal image, focus on the slashed gown on the mannequin and the empty seam-ripper stand, with deeper shadows around the frame. No characters. Mood: ambiguous, elegant, unresolved, quiet discomfort.

wrong_accusation.prompt: Create a cinematic ending image for the wrong accusation ending of “A Última Costura”. Show the interior of Atelier Aurora late at night after the wrong person was accused. The central dress form mannequin still wears the slashed Vestido Estelar, the truth still not found. The clean fabric shears rest on their cloth, the labeled bolta of silk sits in the background, and the antique brass door lock remains pristine, while the real culprit walked away unnoticed. The tall mirrors and brass clothing rails reflect the empty room, indifferent to what was lost. The lighting is warm but heavier with shadows, and the atmosphere is quietly regretful and unresolved, without becoming scary. Composition: wide horizontal image, focus on the slashed gown on the mannequin slightly off-center, surrounded by the clean shears, the silk bolta, the mirrors, and soft shadows, no characters. Mood: unresolved, quiet, regretful, elegant, literary.
